title: calvaria boutoniana
intro: Calvaria boutoniana, also known as Buttonbush, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States and the Caribbean. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used in herbal medicine, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Calvaria boutoniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional folk medicine.
